last_assistant_message:
Saved to `permanent-webhook-portfolio-site.md` in the ADW repo root. It covers:

**Done:**
- All webhook signature validation code (module, integration, port stability, tests, README fix)
- Portfolio site repo created + all pages and components written

**Remaining:**
- Build/verify/push the portfolio site
- Cal.com account setup
- All Cloudflare infrastructure (tunnel, DNS, Pages deployment)
- Generate webhook secret + update `.env`
- Migrate GitHub webhooks to permanent URL
- Full verification checklist
